title: Senator Organa (disambiguation)
content:
'''[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Organa''' may refer to at least two senators from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] or the [[Alderaan sector/Legends|Alderaan sector]]:

*'''[[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]''' represented the Alderaan Sector in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] ([[32 BBY/Legends|32]]–[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]) and in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] ([[19 BBY/Legends|19]]–[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]).
*His adopted daughter, '''[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]''', later '''Leia Organa Solo''', was his successor in the Imperial Senate ([[1 BBY/Legends|1]]–[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]). She later became a member of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] ([[4 ABY/Legends|4]]–[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]).

{{Disambig}}
